title: New House
description: Johan wants to build a new house and he wants his house as large as it can. Given an N x N grid land, find the largest square size that fit in the free area.
input:
The first line of input contains an integer T, the number of test cases follow.

Each test case starts with an integer N (1 <= N <= 10) denoting the size of the grid land. The next N lines each contains N characters. Each character be either '.' (free area) or '#' (obstacle). Your house should be build on free area.
output: For each test case, output in a line the size of the largest square on free area.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Indonesia, Indonesia National Contest, INC 2009
